caption: The video features an exterior shot of the International Criminal Court (ICC) building, prominently displaying its logo and name in both English and French. The ICC's emblem, which includes a stylized scales of justice encircled by laurel leaves, is clearly visible on a blue sign. In the background, the modern architecture of the court building is showcased, with its glass and steel facade reflecting the sunlight. A flagpole with a partially visible flag stands in front of the building, adding to the official atmosphere. The video also includes text overlays indicating that it is related to "World Politics" and mentions "US sanctions 'kangaroo' ICC over war crimes probe," suggesting a discussion or report on political tensions involving the ICC. The scene is well-lit, indicating it was filmed during the day under clear skies.
